raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "asserting a necessary precondition for valued outcomes, functioning as prescriptive guidance on thought and action",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "thought and purpose are separable",
    "intelligent accomplishment is a distinct category that requires their linkage",
    "unlinked thought produces no intelligent results"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent as a motivational claim but hinges on vague, undefined terms that limit logical precision",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the audience accepts purposeful direction as reliably superior for achievement and applies the idea to foster focused effort without stifling exploration",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "spontaneous or emergent thought can yield intelligent outcomes, or rigid insistence on prior purpose discourages valuable unplanned activity"
}
